{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Ironheart Legion of Rosegold
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ironheart Legion of Rosegold]] was scheduled to fight the [[Five Sisters of the Iceflower Continent]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
